demo.title: orlix-b20-deploy.sh
demo.code:
# 1. Get live Base chain status + gas prices
bankr prompt "Use the Orlix B20 skill to get current chain info and gas on Base"

# 2. Check wallet ETH balance before deploying
bankr prompt "Use Orlix B20 skill to check the ETH balance of 0xYOUR_WALLET"

# 3. Read any ERC-20 token on Base
bankr prompt "Use Orlix B20 skill to get token info for 0x799c28BAC95B3E0B26534D1e9A586511895EcBA3"

# 4. Validate your B20 config (live balance + gas check)
bankr prompt "Use Orlix B20 skill to validate: name='BNKR Token', symbol='BNKR', variant=asset, decimals=18, admin=0xYOUR_WALLET"

# 5. Prepare a full B20 deployment bundle (real gas + nonce from Base)
bankr prompt "Use Orlix B20 skill to prepare a B20 asset token: name='My Token', symbol='MTK', 10M supply cap, admin=0xYOUR_WALLET, blocklist policy"

# 6. Deploy a stablecoin variant with allowlist
bankr prompt "Use Orlix B20 skill to prepare a B20 stablecoin: name='OrUSD', symbol='OUSD', supply_cap=100000000, admin=0xYOUR_WALLET, allowlist policy"

# 7. Check a deployment receipt
bankr prompt "Use Orlix B20 skill to check receipt of 0xYOUR_TX_HASH on Base"

setup: No authentication required — the API is fully open
All actions hit real Base RPC — gas prices, nonces, and balances are live, never mocked
Use `prepare` to build a complete EIP-1559 deployment tx — sign and broadcast when Base Beryl activates
